full_text:
Liu Ping 留平
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Ping (留平). Second son of Liu Zan and also a general. Died from stress due to incurring the wrath of Sun Hao. Liu Ping was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
